description: Send notifications to your own MSG91 destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise msg91:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a MSG91 Flow API JSON body and post it to api.msg91.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-msg91_sms

request.template: {"urls":"msg91://${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TEMPLATE }@${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_AUTHKEY }/${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"msg91://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.template_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.authkey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"template_id":"${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TEMPLATE }","short_url":0,"recipients":[{"mobiles":"${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TARGETS }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}]}

{"template_id":"${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TEMPLATE }","short_url":0,"recipients":[{"mobiles":"${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TARGETS }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}]}
